subcodes.first_line: O beloved of the All-Merciful! A missive hath attained unto the Most Holy Court, making mention of nine souls, each specifically [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا احباء الرحمن مکتوبی بساحت اقدس فائز و ذکر نه نفس در او مذکور مخصوص هر یک
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
